a.xlink:title: Implements the Gameplay Debugger category: collect agent state, then render it as text lines.
Tactix category for Unreal's built-in Gameplay Debugger.
The component that makes a pawn a Tactix agent.
Ring buffer of recent AI decisions for replay scrubbing and post-mortems ("why did it do that?...
Bump (linear) allocator for short-lived scratch memory.
A* planner over the GOAP world-state graph.
Depth-first HTN planner with method-order fallback and backtracking.
Export macros, compiler attributes and version constants shared by every Tactix module.
Symbolic world state for the GOAP planner: 64 boolean facts plus a "defined" mask.
The engine-agnostic contract a "thinking" entity implements to take part in Tactix systems.
Read-only, side-effect-free snapshot of one agent for a single decision.
Type-safe generational handle: the only sanctioned way to reference a pooled object across frames.
Small, engine-agnostic vector and scalar math used across Tactix.
